creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
OmegaT is a free translation memory application used by professionals to help them during the translation process.With the following features :

* Fuzzy matching (helps you to choose the right terms based on the project translation history)
* Dynamic view of the original text bellow the translated one
* external glossaries support.
* Several file formats : XHTML,HTML,MS Office XML, Open Office/ Star Office, XLIF, MediaWiki, and Plain Text.
* Unicode (UTF-8) support: can be used with non-Latin alphabets

This tool could be very helpful for the translation teams working on the FreeBSD documentation project.
